parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When disabled, the will no longer send to Beyond. The corresponding image in Beyond will also be cleared.

parameters.name: source
parameters.label: Source
parameters.description: Select the source operator.

parameters.name: sop
parameters.label: SOP
parameters.description: Path to the SOP.

parameters.name: chop
parameters.label: CHOP
parameters.description: to the . The input must have , channels for the point positions. In addition, it also supports , , , , and channels. The channel is used for grouping points together as a single shape. By default when

parameters.name: pop
parameters.label: POP
parameters.description: Path to the POP.

parameters.name: zone
parameters.label: Zone
parameters.description: The index of the zone to send to in Beyond.

parameters.name: ratemode
parameters.label: Rate Mode
parameters.description: Select the mode for calculating the rate of the image in Beyond. Note: this is not the rate of the .

parameters.name: percent
parameters.label: Percent
parameters.description: Specify the sample rate as a percent of the projector default sample rate.

parameters.name: rate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: Specify the sample rate of the image in Beyond

parameters.name: repeat
parameters.label: Vertex Repeat
parameters.description: How often to repeat each point in the image (not including blanked points).

parameters.name: vector
parameters.label: Vector Frame
parameters.description: When enabled, the image will be sent to Beyond as a vector frame. A vector frame will have extra computation done in Beyond, such as the addition of blanking points. When disabled, the image will be s

parameters.name: resend
parameters.label: Resend Image
parameters.description: Resend the image to Beyond.

parameters.name: enableout
parameters.label: Enable Laser Output
parameters.description: Enables laser output in Beyond. Has the same effect as hitting the "Enable Laser Output" button in Beyond.

parameters.name: disableout
parameters.label: Disable Laser Output
parameters.description: Disables laser output in Beyond. Has the same effect as hitting the "Disable Laser Output" button in Beyond.

parameters.name: blackout
parameters.label: Blackout
parameters.description: Sends a blackout command to Beyond. Has the effect as hitting the "Blackout" button in Beyond.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
